message:
feat(command,conformance): expand EXPIRE/PEXPIRE option compatibility tests to match Redis semantics

Hardens expiry command option combination handling to match real Redis behavior:

- Rename test to expire_option_compatibility_rules_match_redis for clarity
- Add EXPIRE XX+GT acceptance test (valid combination per Redis docs)
- Add EXPIRE NX+XX+GT rejection test (NX cannot combine with XX/GT/LT)
- Add PEXPIRE XX+GT accept/reject tests verifying conditional update semantics
- Add PEXPIRE XX+LT accept/reject tests verifying conditional update semantics
- Fix PEXPIRE GT test value from 2500 to 2600 to properly test the GT condition
  against the current TTL state
- Add 3 new conformance fixtures: pexpire_xx_gt_accept, pexpire_xx_lt_accept,
  pexpire_xx_lt_reject for the combined-option PEXPIRE scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1256,6 +1256,35 @@ mod tests {
         )
         .expect_err("unknown option should fail");
         assert!(matches!(unknown, super::CommandError::SyntaxError));
+
+        let xx_gt = dispatch_argv(
+            &[
+                b"EXPIRE".to_vec(),
+                b"k".to_vec(),
+                b"10".to_vec(),
+                b"XX".to_vec(),
+                b"GT".to_vec(),
+            ],
+            &mut store,
+            0,
+        )
+        .expect("xx+gt should be accepted");
+        assert_eq!(xx_gt, RespFrame::Integer(0));
+
+        let nx_xx_gt = dispatch_argv(
+            &[
+                b"EXPIRE".to_vec(),
+                b"k".to_vec(),
+                b"10".to_vec(),
+                b"NX".to_vec(),
+                b"XX".to_vec(),
+                b"GT".to_vec(),
+            ],
+            &mut store,
+            0,
+        )
+        .expect_err("nx cannot combine with xx/gt");
+        assert!(matches!(nx_xx_gt, super::CommandError::SyntaxError));
     }
 
     #[test]
